contract_responses.source: We will pay the death benefit to the beneficiary if the insured dies while this policy is in force and before the policy expiry date.
Upon receipt of proof of death, we will pay the beneficiary: Face Amount + Paid-Up Additions - Policy Loans - Loan Interest.
Death Benefit = Specified Amount under Option A if the insured dies while the policy is in force.
Death Benefit = Face Amount + Account Value under Option II if the insured dies while coverage is active.
After Year 2 (on or after May 1, 2026): We pay the full benefit amount.
If a covered employee dies while insured under the group policy, the insurer will pay the life insurance benefit.
We will pay the death benefit if the insured dies while this policy is in force and all premiums have been paid.
Death benefit is payable only upon the death of the second insured to die.
If the insured dies during the policy term while the policy is in force, we will pay $300,000 to the beneficiary.
Death Benefit = $500,000 (specified amount) if the insured dies while coverage is active.
If the insured commits suicide within two years from the issue date, our liability is limited to a refund of premiums paid.
If the insured dies by suicide within two years from the issue date, we will pay only the premiums paid.
Suicide exclusion applies if death occurs within 24 months of issue.
If death occurs by suicide within 2 years of issue or reinstatement, we pay only premiums paid.
If death occurs by suicide within 2 years of the issue date, we will only return the premiums paid.
